# graphify knowledge-graph (auto-generated)

Nightly code-graph of this repo's HEAD, built by graphify on devops.shahrzad.ai.
Do not edit by hand — this branch is force-pushed every night at 04:00 Tehran.

- `graphify-out/graph.html` — open in a browser
- `graphify-out/graph.json` — GraphRAG-ready
- `graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md` — god nodes, communities, suggested questions
